title: Documentation Protocol
author: Ochabski, David
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-zero
description: Public draft release -- usable, citable, but still under active validation. Version 0.1.1 updates the repository licensing model to CC0-1.0 for non-code protocol content and Apache-2.0 for executable code or automation where applicable. Citation is appreciated and recommended but not required.
